register.note: The semantic grammar holds without dilution across canvas, prose Term links and the experiment panel (blue=prediction line, amber=target points, crimson reserved for the single error: 'flattens the whole trend' and the wrecked £230k estimate), matching r2d3-trees/00's disciplined two-hue semantic split and extending it into prose.

hero.note: A hero would need a full-width scatter with the fitted line and one labeled high-leverage outlier visibly tilting it, composed and legible as a thumbnail, replacing the current title-plus-nav header.

assessment.note: The closing '05 TRANSFER' (sensor -9999 scenario) is a three-option multiple-choice card stack, not an interactive or open prompt, though the per-option feedback and the upstream experiment-task keep the Check from being a pure MCQ stack.

blocking: No hero: promote the See scatter into a full-width opening specimen that depicts the mechanism (the fitted line through the scatter with one labeled high-leverage outlier tilting it), replacing the document-first title-plus-nav header.
Add at least one in-canvas annotation naming the residual/leverage mechanism so the graphic carries its own 'why', lifting annotation-integration off 2.
Tighten the See viewport's vertical composition — close the empty gap below the canvas title chip and the void under the short left column — to reach atmosphere parity with the exemplars.
